messages.author: BMK
messages.text: If you take the correct image and flash it with the flasher it will work! -merged = erase flash and fully new install! Without merge is without erase flash and update the firmware.
messages.content_html: If you take the correct image and flash it with the flasher it will work! -merged = erase flash and fully new install! Without merge is without erase flash and update the firmware.

messages.author: alch3miq
messages.text: Unfortunately I don't see the -merged option for crowdpanel adv 35
messages.content_html: Unfortunately I don't see the -merged option for crowdpanel adv 35
messages.reply_html:
BMK
If you take the correct image and flash it with the flasher it will work! -merged = erase flash and fully new install! Without merge is without erase flash and update the firmware.
